response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in full-stack web development, DevOps, and open-source tooling, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator profiling experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering skills across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical education
Experience with performance-critical systems and low-latency applications
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling
Lacks background in deep learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
No evidence of hardware-software co-design or system-on-chip performance analysis
